name: CAPT
subtitle: Governed cognitive architecture for inspectable AI
thesis: CAPT stores reasoning as modular, inspectable components. Instead of opaque prompt history, decisions retain their origin, evidence, and state transitions — so intelligence is governed, not buried.
description: CAPT is a modular cognitive architecture for persistent, inspectable AI systems. It separates memory, reasoning, and action into governed components that can be observed, audited, and replayed. A 108-module pipeline (sensing, filtering, prediction, attention, memory consolidation, abstraction, causal inference, quantum-inspired consensus, execution, value alignment, curiosity) processes each task as a traceable state graph rather than a black box. The Cognitive State Graph (CSG) records every state transition; ECHO memory palace preserves episodic context; PULSE provides self-healing; HMC handles hierarchical memory compression. The result: an AI system whose reasoning you can open and read.
before: AI remembers you inside someone else's system, as opaque tokens.
after: You govern persistent, inspectable intelligence with a readable state history.

architecture.principle: Reasoning is a first-class, observable artifact — not a side effect of generation.
core_subsystems: ATTN — attention allocation and winner selection
EXEC — goal execution and working memory
VALUE_ALIGN — value alignment scoring and approval
architecture.state_model: Cognitive State Graph (CSG) — every task is a node/edge transition; states are queryable, replayable, and persistable
architecture.memory: ECHO memory palace: episodic traces with resonant recall; HMC compresses to ~0.1% with provenance retained
architecture.governance: Each decision carries source, confidence, and state lineage. VALUE_ALIGN must approve before action. No silent state mutation.
architecture.inspectability: Reasoning traces are readable artifacts — the system can explain not just what it concluded, but how and why

proof.exists: Active open-source architecture (108-module pipeline, CSG, ECHO, PULSE, HMC implemented)
proof.for: Developers building local or sovereign AI
proof.limit: Public repo URL is org-level; specific CAPT repository to be confirmed

inv.human: Understand how your own AI systems could be governed and inspected — every decision traceable, not hidden.
inv.builder: Core substrate: memory, protocol, orchestration components with state lineage.
inv.researcher: Reference architecture for governed, inspectable cognition.
